TITLE: Wall push-ups
DESCRIPTION: Stand facing a wall, hands at shoulder height. Do 12 slow push-ups, focusing on control and breathing.

TITLE: Bodyweight squats
DESCRIPTION: Feet shoulder-width apart. Do 12 slow squats, keeping heels down and chest open.

TITLE: Plank reset
DESCRIPTION: Hold a forearm plank for 30?45 seconds. Keep a straight line from head to heels. Breathe steadily.

TITLE: Glute bridges
DESCRIPTION: Lie on your back, knees bent. Lift hips and squeeze glutes for 12 reps. Slow tempo.

TITLE: Calf raises
DESCRIPTION: Hold onto a chair for balance. Rise onto toes and lower slowly for 20 reps.

TITLE: Standing lunges
DESCRIPTION: Do 8 lunges per side. Keep front knee tracking over toes and torso upright.

TITLE: Jumping jacks (low impact)
DESCRIPTION: Do 45 seconds of step-jacks (one leg out at a time). Keep it comfortable.

TITLE: Shoulder mobility circles
DESCRIPTION: Make 10 large arm circles forward, then 10 backward. Keep ribs down and neck relaxed.

TITLE: Chair triceps dips (gentle)
DESCRIPTION: Hands on chair edge, bend elbows slightly and press back up for 10 reps. Keep it shallow.

TITLE: Stair climb (moderate)
DESCRIPTION: Climb one flight of stairs up and down twice at a moderate pace. Hydrate after.

TITLE: One-song break
DESCRIPTION: Play one song you enjoy and listen without multitasking until it ends.

TITLE: Quick tidy (2 minutes)
DESCRIPTION: Pick one small area (desk corner, shelf). Put away or throw out 5 items.

TITLE: Mini puzzle
DESCRIPTION: Do a 2-minute word puzzle (anagram, mini crossword) just for fun.

TITLE: Window watch
DESCRIPTION: Look outside for 2 minutes. Notice movement, light, and weather without judging it.

TITLE: Tea or water ritual
DESCRIPTION: Prepare a glass of water or tea slowly. Focus on temperature, smell, and taste.

TITLE: Fun fact dive
DESCRIPTION: Read one short article on a topic you?re curious about. Stop after 5 minutes.

TITLE: Photo: find a texture
DESCRIPTION: Take a photo of an interesting texture (wood grain, fabric, metal). Look for light and shadows.

TITLE: Doodle minute
DESCRIPTION: Draw shapes for 60?90 seconds. Let your hand move; no goal, no judgment.

TITLE: Tiny stretch + music
DESCRIPTION: Put on a calm track and do gentle neck/shoulder stretches while it plays.

TITLE: Micro-reading
DESCRIPTION: Read 2?3 pages of a book (paper or ebook). Stop when the timer ends.

TITLE: Gratitude text
DESCRIPTION: Send a short message to someone: ?Thanks for ____.? Keep it simple and specific.

TITLE: Check-in question
DESCRIPTION: Message a friend: ?How?s your day going?? Then pause?no need to overthink.

TITLE: Voice note hello
DESCRIPTION: Record a 15?20 second voice note to say hi to someone you trust.

TITLE: Compliment practice
DESCRIPTION: Give a specific compliment to someone nearby or online (about effort, not looks).

TITLE: 2-minute listening
DESCRIPTION: Ask someone a question and listen without interrupting for 2 minutes.

TITLE: Share a helpful link
DESCRIPTION: Send a useful resource to a colleague/friend with one sentence of context.

TITLE: Micro-kindness
DESCRIPTION: Do one small helpful act (hold a door, reply warmly, refill something).

TITLE: Reconnect list
DESCRIPTION: Write down 3 people you?d like to reconnect with. Pick one to contact later.

TITLE: Thank-you to yourself
DESCRIPTION: Write one sentence recognizing a small win you did today.

TITLE: Plan a mini hangout
DESCRIPTION: Propose a simple plan: coffee, walk, or call. Keep the invite low pressure.

TITLE: Box breathing 4-4-4-4
DESCRIPTION: Inhale 4s, hold 4s, exhale 4s, hold 4s. Repeat 4 cycles to reset focus.

TITLE: 5-4-3-2-1 grounding
DESCRIPTION: Name 5 things you see, 4 you feel, 3 you hear, 2 you smell, 1 you taste.

TITLE: One-minute mindfulness
DESCRIPTION: For 60 seconds, notice your breath. When distracted, gently return to breathing.

TITLE: Brain dump (2 minutes)
DESCRIPTION: Write everything on your mind. No structure. Stop when the timer ends.

TITLE: Single-task reset
DESCRIPTION: Pick one tiny task (open doc, reply to one email). Do only that for 3 minutes.

TITLE: Focus intention
DESCRIPTION: Choose an intention for the next 10 minutes (clarity, calm, speed). Say it once and begin.

TITLE: Body scan 90 seconds
DESCRIPTION: Scan from head to toes. Relax the most tense area by softening it on the exhale.

TITLE: Mindful listening
DESCRIPTION: Listen to nearby and distant sounds for 60?90 seconds. Don?t try to ?fix? the soundscape.

TITLE: Thought labeling
DESCRIPTION: When a thought appears, label it (plan, worry, memory) and let it pass.

TITLE: Visual rest
DESCRIPTION: Look 20 feet away for 20 seconds. Blink slowly and relax your jaw.

TITLE: Short prayer or intention
DESCRIPTION: Take 60 seconds to say a brief prayer or set a heartfelt intention for the day.

TITLE: Loving-kindness (mini)
DESCRIPTION: Repeat silently: ?May I be safe. May I be peaceful.? Then extend it to others.

TITLE: Values check
DESCRIPTION: Ask: ?What matters most right now?? Choose one value (care, courage, honesty) and act once.

TITLE: Breath + gratitude
DESCRIPTION: With each exhale, name one thing you?re grateful for. Do 8 breaths.

TITLE: Nature connection
DESCRIPTION: If possible, look at a tree/sky. Notice one detail you?ve never noticed before.

TITLE: Mantra 1 minute
DESCRIPTION: Choose a calming phrase and repeat it slowly for 60 seconds.

TITLE: Compassion pause
DESCRIPTION: Think of someone struggling. Wish them well for 30 seconds. Keep it simple.

TITLE: Silence timer
DESCRIPTION: Sit in silence for 2 minutes. Allow thoughts to come and go without chasing them.

TITLE: Meaning note
DESCRIPTION: Write one sentence: ?Today I want to contribute by ____.?

TITLE: Forgiveness micro-step
DESCRIPTION: Identify one small resentment. Try this: ?I?m willing to soften this, even a little.?

TITLE: Progressive release (hands)
DESCRIPTION: Clench fists 5s, release 10s. Repeat 3 times. Notice warmth and relaxation.

TITLE: Shoulder drop
DESCRIPTION: Lift shoulders to ears, hold 2s, then drop. Repeat 8 times with slow breathing.

TITLE: Jaw & face relax
DESCRIPTION: Unclench jaw, relax tongue, soften forehead. Hold for 30 seconds while breathing slowly.

TITLE: 4-7-8 breathing
DESCRIPTION: Inhale 4s, hold 7s, exhale 8s. Do 4 cycles. Stop if you feel dizzy.

TITLE: Warm drink pause
DESCRIPTION: Hold a warm mug and feel the heat in your hands. Take 3 slow sips.

TITLE: Mini stretch: neck
DESCRIPTION: Tilt head right 20s, left 20s. Breathe out longer than you breathe in.

TITLE: Slow exhale
DESCRIPTION: Inhale 3s, exhale 6s. Do 10 breaths. Focus on the long exhale.

TITLE: Feet on floor
DESCRIPTION: Sit and press feet into the floor for 10 seconds, then release. Repeat 5 times.

TITLE: Calm gaze
DESCRIPTION: Pick a point and softly focus for 60 seconds. Blink slowly and relax your shoulders.

TITLE: No-screen minute
DESCRIPTION: Put the phone face down and do nothing for 60 seconds. Let your nervous system settle.
